configurations.name: Static Site (Ruby WEBrick)
runtimeArgs: require 'webrick'; s = WEBrick::HTTPServer.new(:Port=>3000,:DocumentRoot=>'/Users/adrianmassey/Desktop/Lucid Corp/Lucid Corp Website (claude)'); trap('INT'){s.shutdown}; s.start

configurations.name: Main Site Preview
runtimeArgs: require 'webrick'; s = WEBrick::HTTPServer.new(:Port=>3456,:DocumentRoot=>'/Users/adrianmassey/Desktop/Lucid Corp/Lucid Corp Website (claude)'); trap('INT'){s.shutdown}; s.start

configurations.name: Deck Preview
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const root='/Users/adrianmassey/Desktop/Lucid Corp';http.createServer((req,res)=>{let f=path.join(root,decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0]));if(f.endsWith('/')||!path.extname(f))f=path.join(f,'index.html');fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=path.extname(f).slice(1);const m={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'application/javascript','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','jpeg':'image/jpeg','svg':'image/svg+xml','gif':'image/gif','webp':'image/webp'};res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':m[ext]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(d);}});}).listen(3458,()=>console.log('Server on 3458'));
